summary: The entire /dashboard/analytics screen (funnel, conversion, ATS histogram, agent ROI, dashboard-summary cards, and the whole Real-Time Market Pulse block) is replaced by a 'Subscribe to unlock Aether' paywall for the canonical test account (admin/admin123), even though that account's free plan already grants and has partially used an agent-run quota, and the backend analytics endpoints demonstrably return real, internally-consistent, non-fabricated data when queried directly with the same account's token.
reproduction: 2. Log in with admin / admin123 (per canonical-login.md)

4. Observe the main content area: instead of the wireframe's funnel/conversion/ATS/ROI/market-pulse panels, a centered card reading 'Subscribe to unlock Aether' with a 'View plans & subscribe' button and a 'You can still browse pricing and manage your account.' line is rendered.

5. Confirm via network capture that GET /api/billing/entitlement fires and returns {"active_paid":false,"plan":{"id":"free","status":"active"},"requiresSubscription":true}, and that none of the 7 mapped analytics endpoints (/analytics, /analytics/dashboard, /analytics/funnel, /analytics/conversion, /analytics/ats-distribution, /analytics/agent-roi, /analytics/market-pulse) are ever called by the browser.

6. Confirm the same gate renders for every other /dashboard/* route tested (/dashboard, /dashboard/settings, /dashboard/jobs, /dashboard/agents) with byte-identical DOM text, i.e. it is a blanket route-tree gate, not analytics-specific.

7. Separately call the analytics endpoints directly with the account's bearer token (curl) — they return real DB-derived data (e.g. GET /analytics/dashboard -> {totalApplications:5, interviews:0, offers:0, jobsFound:44, avgFitScore:38.8, agentRuns:160, agentCostUsd:0.101}), and GET /billing/subscription confirms the free plan already has a used quota ({"quota":{"runsUsed":3,"runsAllowed":5,...}}), i.e. this is not a zero-usage account and the data the paywall hides is real.
expected: Per the wireframe (design/screens/analytics.html) and the tester brief, the admin/admin123 account should be able to load /dashboard/analytics and see its own real (low, for a lightly-used free account) funnel/conversion/ATS/ROI/market-pulse figures, matching the honest-empty-state design intent already implemented server-side (e.g. topSkills legitimately renders as an empty array rather than a fabricated list; Market vs. You honestly reports 'Market data: not connected' rather than fabricating a benchmark).
observed: 100% of the wireframe's screen-specific content is replaced by a full-screen subscription paywall for every account without an active PAID (non-free) plan. The gate is applied uniformly to all of /dashboard/* by apps/web/src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx wrapping children in <SubscriptionGate> (apps/web/src/components/subscription-gate.tsx), which fully substitutes a <Paywall/> for children whenever billing/entitlement returns requiresSubscription && !active_paid — with no partial/read-only pass-through mode. This makes it impossible to perform any of the §3.2 points 1-4, 6 (partial), 8 checks against the actual wireframe elements for this credential.

summary: Because of MV-analytics-001, live visual-conformance, interactive-element, form, wiring, and claim-verification testing of the wireframe's own charts/filters/tabs (funnel, interview-conversion, sources donut, top-skills, ATS histogram, activity heatmap, market-pulse panels, period-range pills, MetricTooltips, Export button) could not be performed with the assigned admin/admin123 credential. A static source read (NOT live UI evidence) of apps/web/src/app/dashboard/analytics/page.tsx and apps/web/src/components/analytics/MarketPulse.tsx suggests some likely deviations from design/screens/analytics.html that still need live confirmation once a paid test account is available: (a) no 'Export' button (wireframe id btn-export-an05) in the implemented header; (b) no header freshness label ('Last 30 days · updated 4 min ago', wireframe topbar-an03); (c) the wireframe's 'Interview Conversion' weekly trend line chart (conversion-an08) is replaced by a 'Stage conversion' percentage grid (found→applied→screened→interview→offer), a materially different visualization backed by GET /analytics/conversion.
reproduction: 1. Attempt to reach /dashboard/analytics as admin/admin123 -> blocked by MV-analytics-001, so no live DOM comparison is possible.

2. Source review only: apps/web/src/app/dashboard/analytics/page.tsx (full file) and apps/web/src/components/analytics/MarketPulse.tsx (full file) contain no button with text 'Export', no rendering of a relative-freshness timestamp, and no weekly interview-conversion line chart component.
expected: Live UI evidence confirming or refuting each wireframe element's presence/absence.
observed: Not observable live; source-code read only. Epistemic status: [INFERRED], not [VERIFIED-WITH-FRESH-EVIDENCE].
